rationale: C20 next_cycle_plan: bug hunt C20 + HubAntre visual refresh. Bug hunt C20 verified 3 files from C20 (journey_map_display.gd, end_run_screen.gd, game_flow_controller.gd) — 0 bugs found. All CRT_PALETTE keys valid, phase guards correct, _classify_event handles both String and Dict effect formats. Feature: Wired 5 FactionRepBar instances into HubAntre — players can now see faction standings in the hub. CRT terminal panel with left-border accent, responsive sizing, animated entry, live signal refresh. FactionRepBar labels upgraded to responsive font for mobile.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C21 (verify faction panel renders correctly on all viewport sizes, check FactionRepBar bar draw with edge values 0/50/80/100). Then feature: HubAntre biome selector with maturity indicators — show biome unlock progress and maturity scores in the hub, replace the direct Broceliande launch with a biome radial that shows locked/unlocked status.
